channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Iran latest: Netanyahu says 'growing signs' Iran's supreme leader Khamenei is 'gone' after US-Israel attacks - BBC
item.description:
1. Iran latest: Netanyahu says 'growing signs' Iran's supreme leader Khamenei is 'gone' after US-Israel attacks  BBC
  2. Live updates: Trump says Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei is dead. Iran has not confirmed his death  AP News
  3. Exclusive: Trump floats "off ramps" after attacking Iran  Axios
  4. Here's how world leaders are reacting to the US-Israel strikes on Iran  NPR
  5. Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei is dead, Trump says  dw.com
